title: corchorus pascuorum
intro: Corchorus pascuorum, also known as the leafy jute or bush jute, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Malvaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant's leaves and stems have been traditionally used in various cultures for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Corchorus pascuorum include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
